title: OpenAI helps Hyatt advance AI among colleagues
summary: Hyatt deploys ChatGPT Enterprise across its global workforce, using GPT-5.4 and Codex to improve productivity, operations, and guest experiences.

title: Accelerate Generative AI Inference on Amazon SageMaker AI with G7e Instances
summary: Today, we are thrilled to announce the availability of G7e instances powered by NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition GPUs on Amazon SageMaker AI. You can provision nodes with 1, 2, 4, and 8 RTX PRO 6000 GPU instances, with each GPU providing 96 GB of GDDR7 memory. This launch provides the capability to use a single-node GPU, G7e.2xlarge instance to host powerful open source foundation models (FMs) like GPT-OSS-120B, Nemotron-3-Super-120B-A12B (NVFP4 variant), and Qwen3.5-35B-A3B, offering organizations a cost-effective and high-performing option.

title: ToolSimulator: scalable tool testing for AI agents
summary: You can use ToolSimulator, an LLM-powered tool simulation framework within Strands Evals, to thoroughly and safely test AI agents that rely on external tools, at scale. Instead of risking live API calls that expose personally identifiable information (PII), trigger unintended actions, or settling for static mocks that break with multi-turn workflows, you can use ToolSimulator's large language model (LLM)-powered simulations to validate your agents. Available today as part of the Strands Evals Software Development Kit (SDK), ToolSimulator helps you catch integration bugs early, test edge cases comprehensively, and ship production-ready...

title: Omnichannel ordering with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore and Amazon Nova 2 Sonic
summary: In this post, we'll show you how to build a complete omnichannel ordering system using Amazon Bedrock AgentCore, an agentic platform, to build, deploy, and operate highly effective AI agents securely at scale using any framework and foundation model and Amazon Nova 2 Sonic.

title: Introducing Brand Studio: The creative production platform powered by your brand
summary: We’re excited to introduce Brand Studio by Stability AI, the end-to-end creative production platform powered by your brand.

title: Stability AI Joins the Tech Coalition
summary: We’re pleased to share that Stability AI has joined the Tech Coalition, a global alliance of leading technology companies working together to combat online child sexual exploitation and abuse.

title: Warner Music Group and Stability AI Join Forces To Build The Next Generation Of Responsible AI Tools For Music Creation
summary: Warner Music Group and Stability AI today announced a collaborative effort to advance the use of responsible AI in music creation, combining WMG’s long-standing advocacy for principled innovation with Stability AI’s expertise and leadership in commercially-safe generative audio.

title: Universal Music Group and Stability AI Announce Strategic Alliance to Co-Develop Professional AI Music Creation Tools
summary: Universal Music Group and Stability AI today announced a strategic alliance to develop next-generation professional music creation tools, powered by responsibly trained generative AI and built to support the creative process of artists, producers and songwriters globally.

title: Stability AI and EA Partner to Empower Artists, Designers, and Developers to Reimagine Game Development
summary: Stability AI and Electronic Arts (EA) have formed a strategic partnership to co-develop transformative generative AI models, tools, and workflows that empower EA’s artists, designers, and developers to reimagine how games are made.

title: Stability AI Brings Image Services to Amazon Bedrock, Delivering End-to-End Creative Control with Enterprise-Grade Infrastructure
summary: Today, we're excited to announce we’re expanding our partnership with Amazon Web Services to bring our Stable Image Services to Amazon Bedrock.

title: Stability AI’s Annual Integrity Transparency Report
summary: At Stability AI, we are committed to building and deploying generative AI responsibly, and we believe that transparency is foundational to safe and ethical AI.

title: Stability AI Introduces Stable Audio 2.5, the First Audio Model Built for Enterprise Sound Production at Scale
summary: We’re excited to release Stable Audio 2.5, our latest audio model and the first developed for enterprise-grade use cases. Stable Audio 2.5 introduces advancements in quality and control that address the demand for dynamic compositions that can be adapted for custom brand needs.

title: Characters @ Character: The Women Powering Character.AI
summary: At Character.AI, we believe that the best products are built by people with diverse perspectives and a shared passion for the future of AI.  Today, we’re celebrating the incredible women driving innovation across our team. As a lean startup, our female leaders have a massive hand

title: Context Caching is Available 2024/08/02
summary: Both deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner have been upgraded to DeepSeek-V3.2.

title: New API Features 2024/07/25
summary: Both deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner have been upgraded to DeepSeek-V3.2.

title: Introducing Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM
summary: ByteDance Seed announced Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM, a speech model focused on attentive listening, robust interference suppression, and more natural interaction. The post presents it as a new model release in the company's speech and interaction lineup.

title: ByteDance Seed 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment is Now Open
summary: ByteDance Seed opened its 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment program, including internship opportunities. This is a company recruitment announcement rather than a product launch.

title: Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview Model Release on Arena
summary: ByteDance Seed released the Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview model on Arena. The announcement indicates an early preview availability of the Seed 2.0 model family.

title: Seed 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seed 2.0. The announcement marks the formal release of a new foundation model in the Seed lineup.

title: Introducing Seedream 5.0 Lite
summary: ByteDance Seed introduced Seedream 5.0 Lite, highlighting deeper thinking and more accurate generation. The post positions it as a new model release in the Seedream series.

title: Seedance 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seedance 2.0. This announcement marks the release of the latest version of the Seedance model.

title: Seed Prover 1.5
summary: ByteDance Seed announced Seed Prover 1.5, describing it as an advanced mathematical reasoning model built with a novel agentic architecture. The release emphasizes improved capabilities for math-focused reasoning tasks.

title: Official Release of Seed1.8
summary: ByteDance Seed officially released Seed1.8, described as a generalized agentic model. The announcement presents it as a new model launch expanding the company's agentic AI offerings.

title: WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5 announced
summary: 01.AI announced WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5, positioning 2026 as a critical year for enterprise deployment of multi-agent systems. The update is presented as a major platform milestone for enterprise AI adoption.

title: 01.AI launches “Super Employee” enterprise AI agent
summary: 01.AI launched “Super Employee,” an enterprise AI agent aimed at delivering measurable business value. The announcement frames it as a new phase for enterprise AI agents focused on practical outcomes rather than experimentation.

title: 01.AI LLM One-box Solution Machine receives CAICT top-level certification
summary: 01.AI announced that its LLM One-box Solution Machine received top-level certification from CAICT. This certification highlights external validation for the company’s enterprise AI infrastructure offering.

title: Yi-Lightning open-source Mixture-of-Experts LLM highlighted
summary: 01.AI featured Yi-Lightning as a global state-of-the-art Mixture-of-Experts large language model and identified it as open source. The mention positions Yi-Lightning as a flagship model announcement from the company.
